heading: Purchase of oil from marginal wells
label: 6247b Purchase of oil from marginal wells

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: From amounts authorized under , in any case in which the price of oil decreases to an amount less than $15.00 per barrel (an amount equal to the annual average well head price per barrel for all domestic crude oil), adjusted for inflation, the Secretary may purchase oil from a marginal well at $15.00 per barrel, adjusted for inflation.section 6246 of this title

children.heading: Definition of marginal well
children.label: b Definition of marginal well
children.text: The term “marginal well” has the same meaning as the definition of “stripper well property” in .section 613A(c)(6)(E) of title 26
